2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 46
Date 28 June 2026
Time 17:05
Title Infringement - Race Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Race Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed AUT DOC 46 - Race Deleted Lap Times .pdf
Felix Holter Loïc Bacquelaine
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 46 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  28 June 2026 
 
        Time  17:05 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Race 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 3, 6, 8, 9 and 10. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time
